title: urvillea ulmacea f. lanceolata
intro: Urvillea ulmacea f. lanceolata is a plant species that belongs to the family Asteraceae, commonly known as the daisy or sunflower family. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine, particularly in South America, for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Urvillea ulmacea f. lanceolata include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and soothe digestive problems. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
